mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.district_name, d.district_code, d.status, d.remark, d.create_time, d.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bs_community c WHERE c.district_id = d.id AND c.del_flag = 0) AS community_count FROM bs_district d WHERE d.del_flag = 0
AND d.district_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.districtName}, '%')
AND d.district_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.districtCode}, '%')
AND d.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
